name: MAGFest Budget System
description: A Flask-based budget request and approval system for MAGFest events.

SECRET_KEY.description: A secret key for verifying the integrity of signed cookies.

scripts.postdeploy: flask db upgrade && python -c "from app import create_app; from app.seeds.config_seed import run_all_seeds; app = create_app(); app.app_context().push(); run_all_seeds()"
